title: template_config
description: Schema for a template's `template.json` (v011 K5). Templates declare their format version, spec_root location, optional doctor extensibility hooks, and optional LLM-prompt paths. v1 livespec supports only template_format_version: 1.

template_format_version.description: Template format version. v1 livespec supports only 1.

spec_root.description: Directory under the repo root containing the spec files, proposed_changes/, and history/. Templates that place spec files directly at the repo root set './'.

doctor_static_check_modules.description: Paths relative to the template root naming Python modules that contribute additional doctor-static checks via TEMPLATE_CHECKS export.

doctor_llm_objective_checks_prompt.description: Path relative to the template root naming a Markdown prompt for the LLM-driven objective-checks phase. null disables this template's contribution.

doctor_llm_subjective_checks_prompt.description: Path relative to the template root naming a Markdown prompt for the LLM-driven subjective-checks phase. null disables this template's contribution.
